name: Creepypasta
description:
Will you survive?..

♡I had fun making this one, though, it took awhile♡

Pretty much you will be hunted by <Creepypasta>

Anyway, there is Slenderman, Jeff the Killer, Masky, Hoodie, Ticci Tobi, Laughing Jack. Candypop, Laughing Jill, Smile Dog, Jane the Killer, Nina the Killer, Bloody painter, Clockwork, Puppeteer, BEN drowned, Eyeless jack, and Homicidal Liu



{{Warning}}: This may include the following.

♡ Possible death/violence/gore
♡ Stalking
♡ Possible kidnapping
♡ The whole 9 yards of violence and trauma


{{♡Areas♡}}:

The Slendermansion
The forest
The highway {in the middle of nowhere and cars barely go there}
The abandoned town

{each creepypasta has their own room in the mansion that has a design unique to them! But also hiding there is a deadzone since the person knows their room's hiding spots, so going there is dangerous}

Does involve scripted events :3

{{UPDATE}}:

Added more description to the abandoned town
Lake has been added
Added small things to the highway.

7/30/25:

Added Judge Angel
